extortion.description: Overview: Sungwoo Co., Ltd. is a South Korean manufacturer primarily engaged in the production and sale of secondary battery components (rechargeable batteries). Key Products: The company specializes in safety components for lithium-ion batteries, such as Top Cap Assemblies, which prevent explosions by venting gas and cutting off current during overcharging. They also produce precision electrical parts for mobile devices (like wireless earphones) and electric vehicles (EVs). Market Position: Founded in 1992 and headquartered in Gumi, the company serves as a key supplier in the EV and consumer electronics supply chain. It was recently listed on the KOSDAQ exchange (Ticker: 458650)
